title: 2 PCS Silicone Cake Moulds, 20×18cm Easy-Release Square Cake Tin, Non-Stick Baking Trays & Brownie Pans for Cheesecake, Cake, Bread and Chocolate Pie (Red)
features: Premium Food-Grade Silicone Material: Crafted from 100% food-grade, BPA-free silicone, these square cake moulds ensure safe and non-toxic baking. The durable material is built to last, providing a reliable and healthy choice for all your baking projects.

Easy-Release Non-Stick Surface: Featuring an excellent non-stick coating, this square cake tin guarantees effortless demoulding. Your cakes, brownies, and cheesecakes release perfectly intact, eliminating sticking and making cleanup remarkably simple.

20x18cm Versatile Size: Each silicone cake mould measures approximately 20cm by 18cm, providing ample space for baking a variety of treats. This size is perfect for creating thick brownies, layered cakes, and hearty breads.

Wide Temperature Resistance & Appliance Safe: With a outstanding temperature range from -40°C to 230°C, these baking trays are safe for ovens, microwaves, freezers, and dishwashers. This versatility makes them suitable for baking, freezing, reheating, and easy cleaning.

Flexible & Multi-Purpose Baking Trays: The flexible silicone design makes these brownie pans ideal for cakes, cheesecakes, bread, chocolate pies, and more. They are easy to clean and store, serving as all-in-one baking essentials for any kitchen.
description: 2 PCS Silicone Cake Moulds, 20×18cm Easy-Release Square Cake Tin, Non-Stick Baking Trays & Brownie Pans for Cheesecake, Cake, Bread and Chocolate Pie
